claims.text: Transcription factors regulate gene expression through complex and co-operative mechanisms.
claims.source_quote: Transcription factors (TFs) regulate gene expression through complex and co-operative mechanisms.
While many TFs act together, the logic underlying TFs binding and their interactions is not fully understood yet.

claims.text: The logic underlying transcription factor binding and their interactions is not fully understood.
claims.source_quote: While many TFs act together, the logic underlying TFs binding and their interactions is not fully understood yet.

claims.text: Most current approaches for transcription factor binding site prediction focus on individual transcription factors.
claims.source_quote: Most current approaches for TF binding site prediction focus on individual TFs and binary classification tasks, without a full analysis of the possible interactions among various TFs.

claims.text: Most current approaches for transcription factor binding site prediction use binary classification tasks.
claims.source_quote: Most current approaches for TF binding site prediction focus on individual TFs and binary classification tasks, without a full analysis of the possible interactions among various TFs.

claims.text: Most current approaches for transcription factor binding site prediction do not perform full analysis of possible interactions among various transcription factors.
claims.source_quote: Most current approaches for TF binding site prediction focus on individual TFs and binary classification tasks, without a full analysis of the possible interactions among various TFs.

claims.text: The authors investigate DNA transcription factor binding site recognition as a multi-label classification problem.
claims.source_quote: In this paper we investigate DNA TF binding site recognition as a multi-label classification problem

claims.text: The authors achieve reliable predictions for multiple transcription factors on DNA sequences retrieved in public repositories.
claims.source_quote: achieving reliable predictions for multiple TFs on DNA sequences retrieved in public repositories

claims.text: The deep learning models are based on Temporal Convolutional Networks.
claims.source_quote: Our deep learning models are based on Temporal Convolutional Networks (TCNs)

claims.text: Temporal Convolutional Networks are able to predict multiple transcription factor binding profiles.
claims.source_quote: Temporal Convolutional Networks (TCNs), which are able to predict multiple TF binding profiles

claims.text: Temporal Convolutional Networks capture correlations among transcription factors.
claims.source_quote: Temporal Convolutional Networks (TCNs), which are able to predict multiple TF binding profiles, capturing correlations among TFs andtheir cooperative regulatory mechanisms

claims.text: Temporal Convolutional Networks capture cooperative regulatory mechanisms among transcription factors.
claims.source_quote: Temporal Convolutional Networks (TCNs), which are able to predict multiple TF binding profiles, capturing correlations among TFs andtheir cooperative regulatory mechanisms

claims.text: Multi-label learning leads to reliable predictive performances.
claims.source_quote: Our results suggest that multi-label learning leading to reliable predictive performances

claims.text: Multi-label learning can reveal biologically meaningful motifs.
claims.source_quote: Our results suggest that multi-label learning leading to reliable predictive performances can reveal biologically meaningful motifs

claims.text: Multi-label learning can reveal co-binding patterns consistent with known transcription factor interactions.
claims.source_quote: Our results suggest that multi-label learning leading to reliable predictive performances can reveal biologically meaningful motifs and co-binding patterns consistent with known TF interactions

claims.text: Multi-label learning suggests novel relationships among transcription factors.
claims.source_quote: while also suggesting novel relationships and cooperation among TFs

claims.text: Multi-label learning suggests novel cooperation among transcription factors.
